name: MCP Trader
what_it_does: MCP Trader server enabling AI agents to access financial market data and perform technical analysis — fetching stock prices, calculating technical indicators (RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands), analyzing price patterns, and integrating market data and trading analytics into agent-driven investment research workflows.
use_cases: Fetching stock price data and historical charts from investment research agents
Calculating technical indicators for trading signals from analysis agents
Analyzing stock price patterns and trend conditions from strategy agents
Screening stocks by technical criteria from portfolio management agents
Building quantitative trading research tools from quantitative agents
Integrating market data analytics into AI-driven trading analysis
not_for: Live order execution (data and analysis only, no brokerage connection)
Guaranteed real-time data (depends on underlying data source quality)
best_when: A quantitative trader or developer needs AI-assisted technical analysis — combining LLM reasoning with quantitative market data and indicators.
avoid_when: You need live order execution, guaranteed institutional-quality data, or a specific brokerage integration.

auth.notes: Market data API key required (likely Polygon.io, Alpha Vantage, or similar). Check repository for current data provider requirements.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free tier market data APIs have delayed data and request limits
pricing.paid_tiers: Polygon.io, Alpha Vantage paid: real-time data from $29-79/month
pricing.notes: MCP server is free open source. Market data API costs depend on provider and tier.

performance.rate_limits: Data provider dependent — free tiers typically 5-500 requests/minute

known_agent_gotchas: Market data API key required — provider selection affects data quality and cost
Free tier data is typically 15-minute delayed — unsuitable for real-time trading
Technical indicators computed server-side — verify calculation methodology
Community MCP from individual developer — financial logic may not be audited
Results are NOT financial advice — agent must add appropriate risk management
Data coverage varies by provider — check symbol availability for your market
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced for data APIs. Market data API key required — store as environment variable. Community MCP. Financial data — not for trading without proper risk management. NOT financial advice.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. API key auth. Community MCP. Not financial advice. Handle with investment risk awareness.
